texts.desc:
Each time a non-Thunder monster(s) is Special Summoned face-up, while this card is in the Monster Zone: That monster(s) cannot attack this turn, also destroy it during the End Phase. 
If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 face-up card you control; destroy it, and if you do, add this card to your hand. 
You can only use this effect of “Thundercrash Snarecrow” once per turn.
texts.name: Thundercrash Snarecrow
texts.str3: The effect of "Thundercrash Snarecrow" is currently being applied.
